sourceRef.paper: AlphaEvolve white paper 2025-05 + reproduced by OpenEvolve (HuggingFace blog 2025-05-20)

statement.en: For the optimal packing of 26 circles of varying sizes in a unit square, AlphaEvolve achieved a sum-of-radii of 2.635. OpenEvolve (open-source reproduction, algorithmicsuperintelligence/openevolve, Apache 2.0) achieved 2.634, within 0.04% of the Google result.
statement.ja: 26 円異径配置 (単位正方形内, 半径和最大化): AlphaEvolve 2.635, OpenEvolve (OSS 再現) 2.634 — 0.04% 以内.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Continuous optimization in R^{52} — Φ → bound established, not unique
reiTyping.rationale: Sum-of-radii is a continuous bound. Multiple near-optimal configurations exist. Tammes-type problem family (also in AlphaEvolve gallery).

reiInterest.lean4Candidate: LOW — geometric optimization is hard to formalize cleanly. Better as numerical / certified-bound result.
reiInterest.paperCandidate: Used as 'sanity benchmark' for OpenEvolve fork (when Rei adds Lean 4 β-evaluator + D-FUMT₈ γ-evaluator layers).
reiInterest.relationToReiStack: ★ This is the standard benchmark for OpenEvolve OSS reproduction. If Rei forks OpenEvolve (per chat-Claude proposal 2026-05-16), reproduction of this 2.634 ≈ 2.635 result confirms environment correctness.

rei_engines: alpha-evolve-engine.ts (STEP 717) — could attempt this with local Ollama LLM

honestScope: Rei has NOT yet attempted this benchmark. Ingest tracks it as canonical reproduction target for OpenEvolve fork integration (chat-Claude 2026-05-16 evening implementation plan).
